name: tcrb-agent
description: TCRB Autonomous Operations Agent — Data, Social, Fundraising, Merch, Members

scripts.social: node -e "require('dotenv').config(); const s=require('./tasks/data-scraper'); const g=require('./tasks/social-engine'); s.scrapeMarketData().then(d => g.generateSocialPosts(d)).then(() => process.exit(0))"
scripts.pending: node -e "require('./tasks/review-queue').getPending().then(p => { console.log(p.length + ' pending items'); p.forEach(i => console.log('  [' + i.id + '] ' + i.type + ': ' + i.title)); process.exit(0); })"

author: TCRB
